title: Cast Iron Cauldron Mortar and Pestle Set
description:
About this item
Measures 2 inches tall with a diameter of 4.5 inches where the carrying handle meets the mouths brim.
The mouth of the mortar itself measures approximately 3 inches in diameter, and is 1 1/2 inches deep.
Stands on 3 feet.
The pestle measures 4 inches.
Made of Cast Iron
reviews_5s: I like the size. It's small, but usable. It is sturdy as well. Great cast iron cauldron!!!!!!cool mortar and pestle! i love that it's cast iron!
